napkin.message.mafia: You are a Mafia member. Each night vote for one person to be killed with the other mafioso.
napkin.message.boss: You are a Mafia boss. Each night vote for one person to be killed with the other mafioso. You also have the ability to pick one more person to be killed each night.
napkin.message.detective: You are the Detective. Each night pick one person to find out if they are a mafioso or not
napkin.message.medic: You are the Medic. Each night you can pick one person to be saved from the mafioso, you can also pick yourself, but not twice in a row!
napkin.message.stipper: You are the Stripper. Each night you can pick one person to sleep with, protecting them from any harm. If you pick a mafioso, you die in the morning.
napkin.message.none: You are a nobody. You have no role XD, better luck next time!
